description: One playground card has uneven padding
expectedBehavior: All cards have equal padding on all sides
actualBehavior: The Flaky Test Lab card has 8px less bottom padding than others
testHint: Assert computed padding-bottom is equal across all .credential-card elements

expectedBehavior: All cards use the word 'Playground' in the purpose field
actualBehavior: The API Services card says 'Lab Environment' instead of 'Playground'
testHint: Assert all [data-testid='card-purpose'] elements contain consistent terminology

actualBehavior: The hero section icon is announced by screen readers as unlabeled image
testHint: Assert decorative SVGs have aria-hidden='true' attribute

description: CTA logs the wrong playground name on click
expectedBehavior: Click event fires with correct playground ID in payload
actualBehavior: Release Risk Lab card fires event with playground_id: null
testHint: Intercept analytics events on card click and assert playground_id matches card data

description: Cards render in wrong order on first load
expectedBehavior: Cards render in defined order: Legacy, API, Event, AI, Flaky, A11y, Release
actualBehavior: Flaky Test Lab and Accessibility Lab cards are swapped on initial render
testHint: Assert nth-child order of [data-testid='credential-card'] matches expected sequence

description: Selected card highlight does not clear on second selection
expectedBehavior: Selecting a new card clears the highlight on the previously selected card
actualBehavior: Both cards appear highlighted after selecting a second card
testHint: Click card A, then card B, assert only card B has the selected class

description: One card wraps badly at 375px viewport width
expectedBehavior: All cards maintain consistent layout at mobile breakpoints
actualBehavior: Event Pipeline Lab card title wraps to three lines at 375px
testHint: Resize viewport to 375px and assert no card title exceeds 2 lines

description: Card purpose text mismatches internal metadata
expectedBehavior: Displayed purpose matches the playground's documented purpose in the registry
actualBehavior: AI Quality Lab card shows 'Prompt testing and response validation' but metadata says 'AI evaluation and rubric scoring'
testHint: Compare [data-testid='card-purpose'] text against bug registry metadata for each playground
